chunks.text: A Decentralized SDN Architecture for the WAN (EECS-2024-240) by Alexander Krentsel, Nitika Saran, Bikash Koley, Subhasree Mandal, Ashok Narayanan, Sylvia Ratnasamy, Ali Al-Shabibi, Anees Shaikh, Rob Shakir, Ankit Singla and Hakim Weatherspoon.
Evaluating Software Switches: Hard or Hopeless? (EECS-2018-136) by Vivian Fang, Tamás Lévai, Sangjin Han, Sylvia Ratnasamy, Barath Raghavan and Justine Sherry.
Hold 'em or Fold 'em? Aggregation Queries under Performance Variations (EECS-2015-267) by Gautam Kumar, Ganesh Ananthanarayanan, Sylvia Ratnasamy and Ion Stoica.
SoftNIC: A Software NIC to Augment Hardware (EECS-2015-155) by Sangjin Han, Keon Jang, Aurojit Panda, Shoumik Palkar, Dongsu Han and Sylvia Ratnasamy.
Netcalls: End Host Function Calls to Network Traffic Processing Services (EECS-2012-175) by Justine Sherry, Daniel C. Kim, Seshadri S. Mahalingam, Amy Tang, Steve Wang and Sylvia Ratnasamy.
A Survey of Enterprise Middlebox Deployments (EECS-2012-24) by Justine Sherry and Sylvia Ratnasamy.
Design and Implementation of a Consolidated Middlebox Architecture (EECS-2011-110) by Vyas Sekar, Norbert Egi, Sylvia Ratnasamy, Michael Reiter and Guangyu Shi.
Reducing Network Energy Consumption via Rate-Adaptation and Sleeping (EECS-2007-128) by Sergiu Nedevschi, Lucian Popa, Gianluca Iannaccone, Sylvia Ratnasamy and David Wetherall.
Inference of Multicast Routing Trees and Bottleneck Bandwidths using End-to-end Measurements (CSD-98-1019) by Sylvia Ratnasamy and Steven McCanne.
